pred: MATCH (l:Lake)-[:partOf]->(db:DrainageBasin)-[:locatedIn]->(c:Country) WHERE db.name = 'Congo basin' RETURN l.name AS lakeName, count(c) AS numberOfCountries

question: What are the names of countries through which rivers that flow into the Madre de Dios River pass, and how many such rivers flow through each country?
gold: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:flowsThrough]-(m0:River)-[r1:flowsInto]->(m1:River {name: 'Madre de Dios River'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num
pred:
MATCH (river:River)-[:flowsThrough]->(country:Country)
             WHERE (river)-[:flowsInto*]->(:Ocean {name: 'Madre de Dios River'})
             RETURN country.name AS CountryName, COUNT(river) AS NumRivers"
}

question: Which has a larger area in square kilometers, the Congo basin or the Tobol basin?
gold: MATCH (n:DrainageBasin {name: 'Congo basin'}), (m0:DrainageBasin {name: 'Tobol basin'}) RETURN CASE WHEN n.area_km2 > m0.area_km2 THEN n.name ELSE m0.name END AS answer
pred:
MATCH (cb:DrainageBasin {name: 'Congo basin'}), (tb:DrainageBasin {name: 'Tobol basin'})
             RETURN CASE
                    WHEN cb.area_km2 > tb.area_km2 THEN 'Congo basin'
                    WHEN cb.area_km2 < tb.area_km2 THEN 'Tobol basin'
                    ELSE 'Both have the same area'
                    END AS larger_area"
}
